overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective of a character leaving a dimly lit indoor apartment, traversing a narrow atmospheric back alley with red lanterns and steam, and emerging into the vibrant neon-lit streets of Night City. The clip features high-fidelity cyberpunk architecture with dense holographic signage, wet reflective surfaces, and a transition from claustrophobic interiors to expansive urban environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit residential apartment and corridor

events.description: approaching the exit door leading out of the building interior

agents.ego_description: walking through a cluttered apartment and down a narrow corridor toward an exit

entered.detail: cluttered desk with papers and objects in the apartment room
tall shelf filled with books and items against the wall
harsh green fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the corridor
doorway leading out of the building with metal frame

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit residential apartment with a wooden desk and bookshelf visible. The camera moves through a narrow corridor with green fluorescent lighting, heading toward an exit doorway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with steam vents and neon signage

events.description: exits the building into a dark narrow alley with steam and neon lights
approaches a standing figure near a gated stairwell at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alleyway, passing steam vents and neon signs, approaching a mysterious figure

notable_agents.action: standing still near a metal gate, illuminated by warm lamplight

entered.detail: large industrial dumpster with green reflective surface
traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead
blue neon sign with Japanese characters reading HOTEL
ground-level vents emitting thick white steam across the alley
metal barred gate blocking the stairwell entrance
colorful spray-painted graffiti on concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a narrow atmospheric back alley filled with steam vents and illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs. The alley is flanked by concrete walls with graffiti. As the character progresses, they approach a standing figure near a metal gate at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell leading to street level

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs away from the alley
opens the metal gate, revealing the bright neon-lit city street above

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs and opening a metal gate to exit onto the main street

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with worn steps leading upward
rusted metal pipe handrail along the stairwell wall
vertical metal bar gate blocking the street entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow concrete stairwell and ascends toward street level. The walls are covered in graffiti and tagged art. At the top, the character opens a metal gate, transitioning from the dim interior to the overwhelming brightness of the neon-lit city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: emerges from the stairwell onto the bustling neon-lit city street
turns the corner, revealing more of the commercial district with pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant city streets, observing neon signs and passing pedestrians, turning corners through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large pink and blue neon sign for Jacked and Coke establishment
towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
elevated highway or monorail track crossing over the street ahead
tall palm tree on the sidewalk near the street corner
multi-story commercial building with red neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the expansive neon-lit streets of Night City, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The 'Jacked and Coke' neon sign dominates the left side of the street. The camera moves through sparse pedestrian traffic, turns a corner past commercial buildings with red neon accents, and continues toward an underpass structure in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic confines of a dim apartment into the overwhelming scale of a neon-drenched metropolis. It begins inside a residential space, moving past a wooden desk and through a narrow corridor bathed in green fluorescent light toward an exit. As the camera emerges into the open air, the environment shifts into a moody back alley filled with steam vents, red paper lanterns, and graffiti-covered concrete walls. The perspective then ascends a narrow, tagged stairwell before pushing through a metal gate, transitioning abruptly from the dim shadows to the blinding brightness of the city. Finally, the scene expands into the vast streets of Night City, gliding past towering holographic advertisements and the prominent Jacked and Coke sign before turning a corner toward a distant underpass.
